purpose: DREQ carve out 2/4 part 2 — Admin-UI frontend. /admin/settings/dev-request-tokens 페이지 + IssueIntakeTokenModal (plain-1회 reveal phase) + IntakeTokenTable + service/types.

components.IntakeTokenTable: frontend/components/dev-request/IntakeTokenTable.tsx — client/source, allowed_ips chips, status badge (active/revoked), revoke action button. empty state + busy guard.
components.IssueIntakeTokenModal: frontend/components/dev-request/IssueIntakeTokenModal.tsx — 2 phase (form → reveal). form: client_label / source_system / allowed_ips (dynamic list 추가/삭제). reveal: plain_token code box + copy button (clipboard API) + 경고 (1회 노출, vault 저장 권고). ESC 는 form phase 만 닫힘 — reveal phase 는 명시적 close 만.

deliverables.page: frontend/app/(dashboard)/admin/settings/dev-request-tokens/page.tsx — header (Key icon + title) + Issue Token 버튼 + table + loading spinner + revoke confirm (window.confirm).
deliverables.nav: frontend/app/(dashboard)/admin/settings/layout.tsx 의 subTabs 에 Intake Tokens (Key icon) 추가. /admin/settings/* 는 AuthGuard 가 system_admin 보호.
deliverables.docs: traceability §3 DREQ row IMPL 컬럼에 frontend intake_admin IMPL 추가 + development_roadmap §3 M5 entry — Admin-UI frontend ✅

verification: npm run build PASS (26 static pages, /admin/settings/dev-request-tokens 포함). vitest 41 tests PASS.

next_carve.3_4: DREQ-E2E (sprint q) — Playwright spec (intake auth → admin issue → revoke; dashboard widget; promote-tx) + Vitest unit (IntakeTokenTable / IssueIntakeTokenModal 두 phase) + TC-DREQ-* 발급. promote-tx P2 carve out (race 가드 / failPromote dead field) 도 흡수 후보.

decisions_log: modal 2 phase 분리 — form / reveal. reveal phase 의 outside-click + ESC 는 닫히지 않게 (실수로 plain token 분실 차단).
allowed_ips 의 frontend 검증은 backend 신뢰 (clean + non-empty 체크 정도만). CIDR 정확성은 backend invalid_allowed_ips 응답으로 surface.
Badge variant='glass' 사용 — 기존 union type 의 한정 (default 없음).
page header 와 modal 의 색상은 orange (intake / DREQ 도메인 시그니처) 일관.
